# Preflight Acceptance Tests

Run this before publishing.

## 3-second silent test

Play the first 3 seconds muted.

Pass if a stranger can answer:

```text
What is this about?
Why should I keep watching?
What is the visual subject?
```

## Screenshot test

Take a screenshot of the first frame.

Pass if it works as a thumbnail:

```text
one focal point
readable text
visible problem or result
no clutter
```

## Promise-body test

Write the hook promise in one sentence.

Then ask:

```text
Does the body fulfil this exact promise?
Does the payoff arrive early enough?
Is anything exaggerated?
```

## Cognitive load test

Watch on phone brightness at 50%.

Fail if:

```text
tiny text
captions too fast
text covers the subject
screen recording unreadable
voice and music compete
```

## Action-value test

Before publishing, declare the intended action.

```text
save / send / comment / follow / search / click
```

Fail if the CTA does not match the actual content value.

## Proof test

For educational or advice content, reject unsupported claims unless the video is explicitly opinion/commentary.

Pass if it contains at least one:

```text
before/after
example
screen recording
data
comment/question
case study
process footage
```

## Naming test

Every video must have:

```text
hypothesis ID
experiment code
variant code
primary metric
failure gate
```
